staticCommands.name: auth
staticCommands.description: Creates a token for an authenticate Azure session

staticCommands.name: execute
staticCommands.description: Execute a BokaMera integrations (ex: convert BokaMera bookings to Rco CSV booking)

staticCommands.name: integration
staticCommands.description: Commands used to integrate BokaMera with other solutions

staticCommands.name: setup
staticCommands.description: Setup and configure a BokaMera integration (ex: Rco)

options.description: Name of scheduled task to run export
